answer.notes: *D335: entities live on DIM/DEFPOINTS layers with 2x INSERT of _ArchTick (dimension tick/dot symbol), 1x MTEXT '\A1;80' (the dimension override text), and 3x POINT on DEFPOINTS (dimension definition points). The 5 LINE entities are extension/witness lines and the dimension line itself, not structural geometry. This matches the anonymous *D-prefixed dimension-cache block AutoCAD generates per associative dimension, so wall_likelihood is low despite the LINE entities present.
